title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people buying a train ticket. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A young man is buying a ticket at a railway station. He is standing at a ticket machine while his friend is holding two backpacks. There is a platform sign, a clock and passengers in the background.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people sitting around a campfire. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A family is sitting around a small campfire at a campsite in the evening. The children are holding sticks with food over the fire while their parents are sitting on camping chairs. There is a tent and trees behind them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
